text: A street scene in a city, likely Bangkok, featuring a wide road shaded by large trees. On the left, a blue tuk-tuk is parked near a small roadside stall. A person in a blue shirt is sitting nearby. In the center, a temporary structure covered by a yellow tarp is enclosed by a blue metal fence. In the background, a large, multi-story building with a pink facade and decorative balconies dominates the right side of the frame. Other buildings and greenery are visible further down the street.
